active.name: Thirsting Slash
active.effects: Deal {{as|175% '''base''' AD}} {{as|physical damage}} to enemies in a {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} 450 radius centered around you. {{tip|Heal}} for {{as|20% AD}} {{as|(+ 8% of your '''missing''' health)}} for each enemy champion hit.

effects_structured.raw: Deal {{as 175% '''base''' AD}} {{as physical damage}} to enemies in a {{tip cr icononly = true}} 450 radius centered around you
{{tip Heal}} for {{as 20% AD}} {{as (+ 8% of your '''missing''' health)}} for each enemy champion hit.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Verified page-level Thirsting Slash semantics: 450-radius centered active, 15-second cooldown, damage before heal ordering, and healing computed per enemy champion hit.
Player-visible execution note: cast time follows the user's attack windup (not instant).
Mode-availability note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped (Prismatic Anvil source); treat non-Arena availability as mode-gated.

Economy representation note: Tier-1 datasets expose distributed-item gold fields (total 1000 / sell 400); these values are retained for reconciliation while acquisition remains Prismatic Item Anvil/mode-scoped rather than standard shop purchase.
